home.subtitle: Organize your projects quickly with AI and manual editing.

notice.localStorageLine: This version is persisting data in your browser (local storage). It is a test version to collect feedback and improve the system.
notice.discordLine: For support, questions, and suggestions, join our Discord:

projects.title: Your Projects
projects.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove project "{title}"?
projects.confirmBackup: Do you want to create a local backup of "{title}" before deleting?
projects.confirmDeleteWithoutBackup: Backup could not be generated. Do you want to delete anyway?

errors.minLength: Project name must have at least 3 characters.

projectDetail.sectionsSubtitle: Search, browse, and reorder top-level sections with drag and drop.

projectDetail.rootSectionDuplicate: A root section with this name already exists.

sectionEdit.title: Edit Section
sectionEdit.resetColorTitle: Reset to the default level color
sectionEdit.customColorActive: ✨ Custom color enabled. Use 'Reset' to return to the default hierarchy level color.
sectionEdit.defaultColorHint: Using the default level color. Click the picker or type a code to customize.
sectionEdit.aiHelpPrefix: AI will improve content while preserving existing

errors.exportFailed: Error exporting document. Please try again.

errors.apiConnection: Failed to connect to API. Please try again.
errors.enterModification: Type what you want to modify.

sectionDetail.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this section?
sectionDetail.confirmDeleteWithChildren: Are you sure you want to delete this section and its {count} subsection(s)?

subsections.title: Subsections
subsections.duplicate: A subsection with this name already exists.

move.cannotBeOwnParent: A section cannot be its own parent.
move.cannotMoveToDescendant: You cannot move a section into one of its descendants.
move.makeRoot: Make it a top-level section (no parent)

errors.invalidKey: Please enter a valid API key

confirm.clear: Are you sure you want to remove your AI settings?

status.activeDescription: You are using your own API key. All AI features are available.
status.missingDescription: Configure an API key to use the app's AI features.

form.providerHint: Groq offers a generous free tier and is the most recommended

howTo.title: How to get your API key:

groq.step3: Open "API Keys" and create a new key

claude.step3: Open "API Keys" and create a new key

security.title: Security and Privacy
security.item1: Your API key is stored only in your browser (localStorage)
security.item2: The key is never sent to our servers or shared
security.item3: Only you can access your key
security.item4: If you clear your browser cache, you will need to configure it again

persistencePage.title: Persistence and Sync
persistencePage.subtitle: Adjust autosave and cloud sync triggers.

form.debounceHint: Minimum time after editing before trying to sync automatically.
